WinningCondition
  1. LCS
  2. WinningCondition
import LCS.Basic import LCS.Observable import LCS.Common import LCS.Strategy.ProjectorStrategy import Mathlib.Order.Fin.Basic import Mathlib.Tactic.Abel

Winning Condition and Loss Operators

This module formalizes the concepts of winning and loss operators for an LCS game. Specifically, it defines the probability of a strategy winning the game and decomposes it into local contributions from each equation.

Key Definitions

    winning_assignments: The set of local assignments that satisfy the $i$-th linear equation.

    local_winning_operator: The operator representing the success probability for a single variable in an equation.

    winning_operator: The average success probability across all variables and equations.

    loss_operator: The complement of the winning operator ($1 - v$).

Key Theorems

    lemma_4_7_1: Relates the sum of Alice's winning projectors to the product of her observables.

    lemma_4_7_2: Connects Alice's marginal projectors to her observables.

open scoped BigOperators set_option linter.unusedSectionVars false variable {G : LCSLayout} (game : LCSGame G)variable {R : Type*} [Ring R] [StarRing R] [Algebra ℂ R] [StarModule ℂ R]variable (strat : LCSStrategy R G) -- ANCHOR: winning_assignments def winning_assignments (i : Fin G.r) : Finset (Assignment G i) := Finset.univ.filter (fun α => (∑ j : G.V i, (α j : Fin 2)) = game.b i)

The local winning probability for a single edge (i, j).

noncomputable def local_winning_operator (i : Fin G.r) (j : G.V i) : R := ∑ x ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i x * strat.F j (x j)

The local loss operator for a single edge (i, j).

noncomputable def local_loss_operator (i : Fin G.r) (j : G.V i) : R := 1 - local_winning_operator game strat i j

The total Winning Operator v is the average of local winning probabilities.

noncomputable def winning_operator : R := ∑ i : Fin G.r, ∑ j : G.V i, let normalization : ℂ := (G.r * (G.V i).card : ℕ) (1 / normalization) • local_winning_operator game strat i j

The total Loss Operator 1 - v.

noncomputable def loss_operator : R := 1 - winning_operator game strat private lemma measurement_sum_mul_projector (i : Fin G.r) (S : Finset (Assignment G i)) (x : Assignment G i) : (∑ y ∈ S, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x = if x ∈ S then strat.E i x else 0 := G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rS:Finset (Assignment G i)x:Assignment G i⊢ (∑ y ∈ S, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x = if x ∈ S then strat.E i x else 0 classical G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rS:Finset (Assignment G i)x:Assignment G ihx:x ∈ S⊢ (∑ y ∈ S, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x = strat.E i xG:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rS:Finset (Assignment G i)x:Assignment G ihx:x ∉ S⊢ (∑ y ∈ S, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x = 0 G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rS:Finset (Assignment G i)x:Assignment G ihx:x ∈ S⊢ (∑ y ∈ S, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x = strat.E i x G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rS:Finset (Assignment G i)x:Assignment G ihx:x ∈ S⊢ strat.E i x * strat.E i x = strat.E i xG:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rS:Finset (Assignment G i)x:Assignment G ihx:x ∈ S⊢ ∀ b ∈ S, b ≠ x → strat.E i b * strat.E i x = 0 G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rS:Finset (Assignment G i)x:Assignment G ihx:x ∈ S⊢ strat.E i x * strat.E i x = strat.E i x All goals completed! 🐙 G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rS:Finset (Assignment G i)x:Assignment G ihx:x ∈ S⊢ ∀ b ∈ S, b ≠ x → strat.E i b * strat.E i x = 0 intro y G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rS:Finset (Assignment G i)x:Assignment G ihx:x ∈ Sy:Assignment G ia✝:y ∈ S⊢ y ≠ x → strat.E i y * strat.E i x = 0 G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rS:Finset (Assignment G i)x:Assignment G ihx:x ∈ Sy:Assignment G ia✝:y ∈ Shyx:y ≠ x⊢ strat.E i y * strat.E i x = 0; All goals completed! 🐙 G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rS:Finset (Assignment G i)x:Assignment G ihx:x ∉ S⊢ (∑ y ∈ S, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x = 0 G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rS:Finset (Assignment G i)x:Assignment G ihx:x ∉ S⊢ ∀ x_1 ∈ S, strat.E i x_1 * strat.E i x = 0 intro y G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rS:Finset (Assignment G i)x:Assignment G ihx:x ∉ Sy:Assignment G ihy:y ∈ S⊢ strat.E i y * strat.E i x = 0 exact (strat.alice_ms i).orthogonal y x (G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rS:Finset (Assignment G i)x:Assignment G ihx:x ∉ Sy:Assignment G ihy:y ∈ S⊢ y ≠ x G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rS:Finset (Assignment G i)y:Assignment G ihy:y ∈ Shx:y ∉ S⊢ False; All goals completed! 🐙) private lemma alice_A_mul_projector (i : Fin G.r) (j : G.V i) (x : Assignment G i) : Alice_A strat i j * strat.E i x = ((-1 : ℂ) ^ (x j).val) • strat.E i x := G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)x:Assignment G i⊢ Alice_A strat i j * strat.E i x = (-1) ^ ↑(x j) • strat.E i x classical G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)x:Assignment G i⊢ (∑ i_1 with (fun x => x j) i_1 = 0, strat.E i i_1 - ∑ i_1 with (fun x => x j) i_1 = 1, strat.E i i_1) * strat.E i x = (-1) ^ ↑(x j) • strat.E i x G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)x:Assignment G i⊢ ((if x ∈ {i_1 | (fun x => x j) i_1 = 0} then strat.E i x else 0) - if x ∈ {i_1 | (fun x => x j) i_1 = 1} then strat.E i x else 0) = (-1) ^ ↑(x j) • strat.E i x match h : x j with G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)x:Assignment G ih:x j = 0⊢ ((if x ∈ {i_1 | (fun x => x j) i_1 = 0} then strat.E i x else 0) - if x ∈ {i_1 | (fun x => x j) i_1 = 1} then strat.E i x else 0) = (-1) ^ ↑0 • strat.E i x All goals completed! 🐙 G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)x:Assignment G ih:x j = 1⊢ ((if x ∈ {i_1 | (fun x => x j) i_1 = 0} then strat.E i x else 0) - if x ∈ {i_1 | (fun x => x j) i_1 = 1} then strat.E i x else 0) = (-1) ^ ↑1 • strat.E i x All goals completed! 🐙 private lemma alice_partial_prod_mul_projector (i : Fin G.r) (s : Finset (G.V i)) (x : Assignment G i) (comm : (s : Set (G.V i)).Pairwise (fun j j' => Commute (Alice_A strat i j) (Alice_A strat i j'))) : s.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) comm * strat.E i x = (s.prod fun j => (-1 : ℂ) ^ (x j).val) • strat.E i x := G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rs:Finset ↥(G.V i)x:Assignment G icomm:(↑s).Pairwise fun j j' => Commute (Alice_A strat i j) (Alice_A strat i j')⊢ s.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) comm * strat.E i x = (∏ j ∈ s, (-1) ^ ↑(x j)) • strat.E i x classical induction s using Finset.cons_induction_on with G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rx:Assignment G icomm:(↑∅).Pairwise fun j j' => Commute (Alice_A strat i j) (Alice_A strat i j')⊢ ∅.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) comm * strat.E i x = (∏ j ∈ ∅, (-1) ^ ↑(x j)) • strat.E i x All goals completed! 🐙 G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rx:Assignment G ia:↥(G.V i)s:Finset ↥(G.V i)ha:a ∉ sih:∀ (comm : (↑s).Pairwise fun j j' => Commute (Alice_A strat i j) (Alice_A strat i j')), s.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) comm * strat.E i x = (∏ j ∈ s, (-1) ^ ↑(x j)) • strat.E i xcomm:(↑(Finset.cons a s ha)).Pairwise fun j j' => Commute (Alice_A strat i j) (Alice_A strat i j')⊢ (Finset.cons a s ha).noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) comm * strat.E i x = (∏ j ∈ Finset.cons a s ha, (-1) ^ ↑(x j)) • strat.E i x G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ j ∈ s, (-1) ^ ↑(x j)) • strat.E i x = ((-1) ^ ↑(x a) * ∏ x_1 ∈ s, (-1) ^ ↑(x x_1)) • strat.E i x G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ j ∈ s, (-1) ^ ↑(x j)) • strat.E i x = ((-1) ^ ↑(x a) * ∏ x_1 ∈ s, (-1) ^ ↑(x x_1)) • strat.E i x G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rx:Assignment G ia:↥(G.V i)s:Finset ↥(G.V i)ha:a ∉ sih:∀ (comm : (↑s).Pairwise fun j j' => Commute (Alice_A strat i j) (Alice_A strat i j')), s.noncommProd (fun j => j)) • (-1) ^ ↑(x a) • strat.E i x = ((-1) ^ ↑(x a) * ∏ x_1 ∈ s, (-1) ^ ↑(x x_1)) • strat.E i x All goals completed! 🐙 private lemma prod_sign_eq_sum_sign_aux {G : LCSLayout} {i : Fin G.r} (x : Assignment G i) (s : Finset (G.V i)) : (s.prod fun j => (-1 : ℂ) ^ (x j).val) = (-1 : ℂ) ^ ((s.sum fun j => (x j : Fin 2)).val) := G:LCSLayouti:Fin G.rx:Assignment G is:Finset ↥(G.V i)⊢ ∏ j ∈ s, (-1) ^ ↑(x j) = (-1) ^ ↑(∑ j ∈ s, x j) induction s using Finset.cons_induction_on with G:LCSLayouti:Fin G.rx:Assignment G i⊢ ∏ j ∈ ∅, (-1) ^ ↑(x j) = (-1) ^ ↑(∑ j ∈ ∅, x j) All goals completed! 🐙 G:LCSLayouti:Fin G.rx:Assignment G ia:↥(G.V i)s:Finset ↥(G.V i)ha:a ∉ sih:∏ j ∈ s, (-1) ^ ↑(x j) = (-1) ^ ↑(∑ j ∈ s, x j)⊢ ∏ j ∈ Finset.cons a s ha, (-1) ^ ↑(x j) = (-1) ^ ↑(∑ j ∈ Finset.cons a s ha, x j) All goals completed! 🐙 private lemma prod_sign_eq_sum_sign {G : LCSLayout} (i : Fin G.r) (x : Assignment G i) : ((G.V i).attach.prod fun j => (-1 : ℂ) ^ (x j).val) = (-1 : ℂ) ^ ((∑ j : G.V i, (x j : Fin 2)).val) := prod_sign_eq_sum_sign_aux x _ lemma lemma_4_7_1 (i : Fin G.r) : (∑ x ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i x) = (1/2 : ℂ) • (1 + (-1 : ℂ)^(game.b i).val • ((G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) (fun j _ j' _ _ => alice_observables_commute strat i j j'))) := G:LCSLayoutgame:LCSGame GR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.r⊢ ∑ x ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i x = (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯) classical G:LCSLayoutgame:LCSGame GR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rhsum_one:∑ x, strat.E i x = 1 := (strat.alice_ms i).sum_one⊢ ∑ x ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i x = (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯) G:LCSLayoutgame:LCSGame GR:Type i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯rhs:R := (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • prodA)⊢ ∑ x ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i x = (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯) -- The key step: show per-projector equality, then sum suffices h : ∀ x : Assignment G i, (∑ y ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x = rhs * strat.E i x G:LCSLayoutgame:LCSGame GR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rhsum_one:∑ x, strat.E i x = 1 := (strat.alice_ms i).sum_oneprodA:R := (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯rhs:R := (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • prodA)h:∀ (x : Assignment G i), (∑ y ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x = rhs * strat.E i x := ?m.179⊢ ∑ x ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i x = (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯) calc ∑ x ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i x = (∑ x ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i x) * 1 := G:LCSLayoutgame:LCSGame GR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rhsum_one:∑ x, strat.E i x = 1 := (strat.alice_ms i).sum_oneprodA:R := (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯rhs:R := (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • prodA)h:∀ (x : Assignment G i), (∑ y ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x = rhs * strat.E i x := ?m.179⊢ ∑ x ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i x = (∑ x ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i x) * 1 All goals completed! 🐙 _ = (∑ x ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i x) * ∑ x, strat.E i x := G:LCSLayoutgame:LCSGame GR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rhsum_one:∑ x, strat.E i x = 1 := (strat.alice_ms i).sum_oneprodA:R := (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯rhs:R := (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • prodA)h:∀ (x : Assignment G i), (∑ y ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x = rhs * strat.E i x := ?m.179⊢ (∑ x ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i x) * 1 = (∑ x ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i x) * ∑ x, strat.E i x All goals completed! 🐙 _ = ∑ x, (∑ y ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x := G:LCSLayoutgame:LCSGame GR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rhsum_one:∑ x, strat.E i x = 1 := (strat.alice_ms i).sum_oneprodA:R := (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯rhs:R := (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • prodA)h:∀ (x : Assignment G i), (∑ y ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x = rhs * strat.E i x := ?m.179⊢ (∑ x ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i x) * ∑ x, strat.E i x = ∑ x, (∑ y ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x All goals completed! 🐙 _ = ∑ x, rhs * strat.E i x := G:LCSLayoutgame:LCSGame GR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rhsum_one:∑ x, strat.E i x = 1 := (strat.alice_ms i).sum_oneprodA:R := (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯rhs:R := (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • prodA)h:∀ (x : Assignment G i), (∑ y ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x = rhs * strat.E i x := ?m.179⊢ ∑ x, (∑ y ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x = ∑ x, rhs * strat.E i x G:LCSLayoutgame:LCSGame GR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rhsum_one:∑ x, strat.E i x = 1 := (strat.alice_ms i).sum_oneprodA:R := (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯rhs:R := (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • prodA)h:∀ (x : Assignment G i), (∑ y ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x = rhs * strat.E i x := ?m.179⊢ ∀ x ∈ Finset.univ, (∑ y ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x = rhs * strat.E i x intro x G:LCSLayoutgame:LCSGame GR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rhsum_one:∑ x, strat.E i x = 1 := (strat.alice_ms i).sum_oneprodA:R := (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯rhs:R := (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • prodA)h:∀ (x : Assignment G i), (∑ y ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x = rhs * strat.E i x := ?m.179x:Assignment G ia✝:x ∈ Finset.univ⊢ (∑ y ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x = rhs * strat.E i x All goals completed! 🐙 _ = rhs * ∑ x, strat.E i x := G:LCSLayoutgame:LCSGame GR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rhsum_one:∑ x, strat.E i x = 1 := (strat.alice_ms i).sum_oneprodA:R := (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A i x = rhs * ∑ x, strat.E i x All goals completed! 🐙 _ = rhs := G:LCSLayoutgame:LCSGame GR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rhsum_one:∑ x, strat.E i x = 1 := (strat.alice_ms i).sum_oneprodA:R := (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯rhs:R := (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • prodA)h:∀ (x : Assignment G i), (∑ y ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i y) * strat.E i x = rhs * strat.E i x := ?m.179⊢ rhs * ∑ x, strat.E i x = rhs All goals completed! 🐙 G:LCSLayoutgame:LCSGame GR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rhsum_one:∑ x, strat.E i x = 1 := (strat.alice_ms i).sum_oneprodA:R := (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯rhs:R := (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • prodA)x:Assignment G i⊢ (if x ∈ winning_assignments game i then strat.E i x else 0) = rhs * strat.E i x -- RHS: expand G:LCSLayoutgame:LCSGame GR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rhsum_one:∑ x, strat.E i x = 1 := (strat.alice_ms i).sum_oneprodA:R := (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯rhs:R := (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • prodA)x:Assignment G ihprod:prodA * strat.E i x = (∏ j ∈ (G.V i).attach, (-1) ^ ↑(x j)) • strat.E i x := alice_partial_prod_mul_projector strat i (G.V i).attach x fun j x j' x_1 x_2 => alice_observables_commute strat i j j'⊢ (if x ∈ winning_assignments game i then strat.E i x else 0) = rhs * strat.E i x G:LCSLayoutgame:LCSGame GR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rhsum_one:∑ x, strat.E i x = 1 := (strat.alice_ms i).sum_oneprodA:R := (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯rhs:R := (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • prodA)x:Assignment G ihprod:prodA * strat.E i x = (∏ j ∈ (G.V i).attach, (-1) ^ ↑(x j)) • strat.E i x := alice_partial_prod_mul_projector strat i (G.V i).attach x fun j x j' x_1 x_2 => alice_observables_commute strat i j j'hsign:∏ j ∈ (G.V i).attach, (-1) ^ ↑(x j) = (-1) ^ ↑(∑ j, x j) := prod_sign_eq_sum_sign i x⊢ (if x ∈ winning_assignments game i then strat.E i x else 0) = rhs * strat.E i x -- Expand rhs * E i x -- Directly compute both sides and match via sign_indicator conv_rhs => G:LCSLayoutgame:LCSGame GR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rhsum_one:∑ x, strat.E i x = 1 := (strat.alice_ms i).sum_oneprodA:R := (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯rhs:R := (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • prodA)x:Assignment G ihprod:prodA * strat.E i x = (∏ j ∈ (G.V i).attach, (-1) ^ ↑(x j)) • strat.E i x := alice_partial_prod_mul_projector strat i (G.V i).attach x fun j x j' x_1 x_2 => alice_observables_commute strat i j j'hsign:∏ j ∈ (G.V i).attach, (-1) ^ ↑(x j) = (-1) ^ ↑(∑ j, x j) := prod_sign_eq_sum_sign i x| (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • prodA) * strat.E i x G:LCSLayoutgame:LCSGame GR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rhsum_one:∑ x, strat.E i x = 1 := (strat.alice_ms i).sum_oneprodA:R := (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯rhs:R := (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • prodA)x:Assignment G ihprod:prodA * strat.E i x = (∏ j ∈ (G.V i).attach, (-1) ^ ↑(x j)) • strat.E i x := alice_partial_prod_mul_projector strat i (G.V i).attach x fun j x j' x_1 x_2 => alice_observables_commute strat i j j'hsign:∏ j ∈ (G.V i).attach, (-1) ^ ↑(x j) = (-1) ^ ↑(∑ j, x j) := prod_sign_eq_sum_sign i x| (1 / 2 + 1 / 2 * (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) * (-1) ^ ↑(∑ j, x j)) • strat.E i x have hsign2 : (1/2 : ℂ) + (1/2 : ℂ) * (-1 : ℂ) ^ (game.b i).val * (-1 : ℂ) ^ (∑ j : G.V i, (x j : Fin 2)).val = if (∑ j : G.V i, (x j : Fin 2)) = game.b i then 1 else 0 := G:LCSLayoutgame:LCSGame GR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.r⊢ ∑ x ∈ winning_assignments game i, strat.E i x = (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯) All goals completed! 🐙 G:LCSLayoutgame:LCSGame GR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rhsum_one:∑ x, strat.E i x = 1 := (strat.alice_ms i).sum_oneprodA:R := (G.V i).attach.noncommProd (fun j => Alice_A strat i j) ⋯rhs:R := (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) • prodA)x:Assignment G ihprod:prodA * strat.E i x = (∏ j ∈ (G.V i).attach, (-1) ^ ↑(x j)) • strat.E i x := alice_partial_prod_mul_projector strat i (G.V i).attach x fun j x j' x_1 x_2 => alice_observables_commute strat i j j'hsign:∏ j ∈ (G.V i).attach, (-1) ^ ↑(x j) = (-1) ^ ↑(∑ j, x j) := prod_sign_eq_sum_sign i xhsign2:1 / 2 + 1 / 2 * (-1) ^ ↑(game.b i) * (-1) ^ ↑(∑ j, x j) = if ∑ j, x j = game.b i then 1 else 0 := sign_indicator (game.b i) (∑ j, x j)⊢ (if x ∈ winning_assignments game i then strat.E i x else 0) = (if ∑ j, x j = game.b i then 1 else 0) • strat.E i x All goals completed! 🐙 lemma lemma_4_7_2 (i : Fin G.r) (j : G.V i) (y : Fin 2) : (∑ x ∈ Finset.univ.filter (fun x : Assignment G i => x j = y), strat.E i x) = (1 / 2 : ℂ) • (1 + (-1 : ℂ) ^ y.val • Alice_A strat i j) := G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)y:Fin 2⊢ ∑ x with x j = y, strat.E i x = (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑y • Alice_A strat i j) classical G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)y:Fin 2A:R := ∑ x with x j = 0, strat.E i x⊢ ∑ x with x j = y, strat.E i x = (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑y • Alice_A strat i j) G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)y:Fin 2A:R := ∑ x with x j = 0, strat.E i xB:R := ∑ x with x j = 1, strat.E i x⊢ ∑ x with x j = y, strat.E i x = (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑y • Alice_A strat i j) -- InducedMeasurementSystem.sum_one gives A + B = 1 directly, -- replacing the manual partition argument (hnot + hpart) G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)y:Fin 2A:R := ∑ x with x j = 0, strat.E i xB:R := ∑ x with x j = 1, strat.E i xhind:IsMeasurementSystem (InducedMeasurementSystem (strat.E i) fun x => x j) := induced_measurement_system_is_measurement_system (strat.E i) (strat.alice_ms i) fun x => x j⊢ ∑ x with x j = y, strat.E i x = (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑y • Alice_A strat i j) have hpart : A + B = 1 := G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)y:Fin 2⊢ ∑ x with x j = y, strat.E i x = (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑y • Alice_A strat i j) G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)y:Fin 2A:R := ∑ x with x j = 0, strat.E i xB:R := ∑ x with x j = 1, strat.E i xhind:IsMeasurementSystem (InducedMeasurementSystem (strat.E i) fun x => x j) := induced_measurement_system_is_measurement_system (strat.E i) (strat.alice_ms i) fun x => x jh:∑ x, InducedMeasurementSystem (strat.E i) (fun x => x j) x = 1 := hind.sum_one⊢ A + B = 1 G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)y:Fin 2A:R := ∑ x with x j = 0, strat.E i xB:R := ∑ x with x j = 1, strat.E i xhind:IsMeasurementSystem (InducedMeasurementSystem (strat.E i) fun x => x j) := induced_measurement_system_is_measurement_system (strat.E i) (strat.alice_ms i) fun x => x jh:InducedMeasurementSystem (strat.E i) (fun x => x j) 0 + InducedMeasurementSystem (strat.E i) (fun x => x j) 1 = 1⊢ A + B = 1 G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)y:Fin 2A:R := ∑ x with x j = 0, strat.E i xB:R := ∑ x with x j = 1, strat.E i xhind:IsMeasurementSystem (InducedMeasurementSystem (strat.E i) fun x => x j) := induced_measurement_system_is_measurement_system (strat.E i) (strat.alice_ms i) fun x => x jh:∑ i_1 with i_1 j = 0, strat.E i i_1 + ∑ i_1 with i_1 j = 1, strat.E i i_1 = 1⊢ A + B = 1 All goals completed! 🐙 G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)y:Fin 2A:R := ∑ x with x j = 0, strat.E i xB:R := ∑ x with x j = 1, strat.E i xhind:IsMeasurementSystem (InducedMeasurementSystem (strat.E i) fun x => x j) := induced_measurement_system_is_measurement_system (strat.E i) (strat.alice_ms i) fun x => x jhpart:A + B = 1 := have h := hind.sum_one; Eq.mp (congrArg (fun _a => _a = 1) (Fin.sum_univ_two (InducedMeasurementSystem (strat.E i) fun x => x j))) h⊢ ∑ x with x j = y, strat.E i x = (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑y • (∑ i_1 with (fun x => x j) i_1 = 0, strat.E i i_1 - ∑ i_1 with (fun x => x j) i_1 = 1, strat.E i i_1)) G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)A:R := ∑ x with x j = 0, strat.E i xB:R := ∑ x with x j = 1, strat.E i xhind:IsMeasurementSystem (InducedMeasurementSystem (strat.E i) fun x => x j) := induced_measurement_system_is_measurement_system (strat.E i) (strat.alice_ms i) fun x => x jhpart:A + B = 1 := have h := hind.sum_one; Eq.mp (congrArg (fun _a => _a = 1) (Fin.sum_univ_two (InducedMeasurementSystem (strat.E i) fun x => x j))) h⊢ ∑ x with x j = 0, strat.E i x = (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑0 • (∑ i_1 with (fun x => x j) i_1 = 0, strat.E i i_1 - ∑ i_1 with (fun x => x j) i_1 = 1, strat.E i i_1))G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring with x j = 0, strat.E i x = (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑0 • (∑ i_1 with (fun x => x j) i_1 = 0, strat.E i i_1 - ∑ i_1 with (fun x => x j) i_1 = 1, strat.E i i_1)) G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring (fun x => x j) i_1 = 1, strat.E i i_1)) G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)A:R := ∑ x with x j = 0, (strat.alice_ms i) fun x => x jhpart:A + B = 1 := have h := hind.sum_one; Eq.mp (congrArg (fun _a => _a = 1) (Fin.sum_univ_two (InducedMeasurementSystem (strat.E i) fun x => x j))) h⊢ A = (1 / 2) • (1 + (∑ i_1 with i_1 j = 0, strat.E i i_1 - ∑ i_1 with i_1 j = 1, strat.E i i_1)) have hform : 1 + (A - B) = A + A := G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)y:Fin 2⊢ ∑ x with x j = y, strat.E i x = (1 / 2) • (1 + (-1) ^ ↑y • Alice_A strat i j) G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)A:R := ∑ x with x j = 0, strat.E i xB:R := ∑ x with x j = 1, strat.E i xhind:IsMeasurementSystem (InducedMeasurementSystem (strat.E i) fun x => x j) := induced_measurement_system_is_measurement_system (strat.E i) (strat.alice_ms i) fun x => x jhpart:A + B = 1 := have h := hind.sum_one; Eq.mp (congrArg (fun _a => _a = 1) (Fin.sum_univ_two (InducedMeasurementSystem (strat.E i) fun x => x j))) h⊢ A + B + (A - B) = A + A; All goals completed! 🐙 G:LCSLayoutR:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)A:R := ∑ x with x j = 0, strat.E i xB:R := ∑ x with x j = 1, strat.E i xhind:IsMeasurementSystem (InducedMeasurementSystem (strat.E i) fun x => x j) := induced_measurement_system_is_measurement_system (strat.E i) (strat.alice_ms i) fun x => x jhpart:A + B = 1 := have h := hind.sum_one; Eq.mp (congrArg (fun _a => _a = 1) (Fin.sum_univ_two (InducedMeasurementSystem (strat.E i) fun x => x j))) hhform:1 + (A - B) = A + A := Eq.mpr (id (congrArg (fun _a => _a + (A - B) = A + A) (Eq.symm hpart))) (Eq.trans (Mathlib.Tactic.Abel.subst_into_addg (A + B) (A - B) (Mathlib.Tactic.Abel.termg 1 A (Mathlib.Tactic.Abel.termg 1 B 0)) (Mathlib.Tactic.Abel.termg 1 A (Mathlib.Tactic.Abel.termg (-1) B 0)) (Mathlib.Tactic.Abel.termg 2 A 0) (Mathlib.Tactic.Abel.subst_into_addg A B (Mathlib.Tactic.Abel.termg 1 A 0) (Mathlib.Tactic.Abel.termg 1 B 0) (Mathlib.Tactic.Abel.termg 1 A (Mathlib.Tactic.Abel.termg bob_observable_sq (j : Fin G.s) : Bob_B strat j * Bob_B strat j = 1 := (bob_is_observable strat j).involutive lemma alice_observable_sq (i : Fin G.r) (j : G.V i) : Alice_A strat i j * Alice_A strat i j = 1 := (alice_is_observable strat i j).involutive
